task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 02-6-010 White Ink Recirculation (Special Test)

section.title: Function
section.p: Recirculation can be started and stopped.
With this special test ink recirculation can be started and stopped manually.
Service technician can detach the return tube at the bulk supply and position the tube in a kind of waste tray to check if the recirculation pump is running .
When the test is started the test first checks if the "print head level sensor" is not set to the max.
Initial stirring is performed (120 sec.) to ensure that the ink is mixed homogeneously.
The technician can toggle between "start and stop circulation".

li.p: stopped due to timeout | dosing to print head detected

section.p: When a print head is already overfilled the test will end with status "Failed" and result "print head overfilled".
The Service Technician can use 07-6-002 "Clean the printheads (one pulse + wipe action)" to lower the ink level in the print head.

When during ink recirculation a rise of the ink level in the print head is detected recirculation will stop immediately and the test will end with status "Failed" and result "dosing to print head detected".
In that case the 3 way valve may not function correctly.
Each time ink recirculation is started recirculation will be performed for 10 minutes (parameter duration) to prevent excessive ink spillage.
The test will show the remaining recirculation time and stop with status "stopped due to timeout" when the recirculation time has passed.
The Service Technician can always interrupt recirculation with the toggle button or by stopping the test.
